[]	shugenbaba@gmail.com	13426056438	Songjiang	NULL	{"friday": ["dinner"], "monday": ["dinner"], "saturday": ["dinner"], "sunday": ["dinner"], "thursday": ["dinner"], "tuesday": ["dinner"], "wednesday": ["dinner"]}	4	Northern-Southern fusion	When the North meets the South	When the North meets the South (南北融合)

Welcome to our table! This menu features Jiā Cháng Cài (Home-style Cooking)—the heart and soul of Chinese dining. Unlike restaurant food, these dishes are designed for comfort and balance. We bring together a mix of Northern heartiness and Southern delicacy, featuring savory stir-fries, tender braises, and classic family favorites.

---

Meat & Poultry (荤菜)

1. Flash-Fried Lamb with Scallions
   葱爆羊肉
   Tender slices of lamb wok-seared with aromatic green onions. A classic Northern dish full of flavor.

2. Honey Glazed Cumin Chicken Wings
   蜜汁孜然鸡翅
   Savory and sweet wings with a fragrant kick of cumin spice.

3. Steamed Chicken Wings with Shiitake Mushrooms
   香菇蒸鸡翅
   A lighter, healthier option where the savory juices of the mushrooms infuse the tender chicken.

4. Homestyle Stir-fried Beef
   小炒牛肉
   Slices of beef stir-fried with fresh peppers and spices for a rich, savory taste.

---

Vegetables & Tofu (素菜与豆腐)

5. Sautéed Green Beans with Minced Pork & Olive Veg
   榄菜肉末四季豆
   Crunchy green beans stir-fried with savory minced pork and "Olive Vegetable" (a classic savory preserve).

6. Stir-fried Snow Peas with Chinese Sausage
   荷兰豆炒香肠
   Crisp, sweet snow peas paired with the rich, smoky flavor of cured Chinese sausage.

7. Braised Tofu with Scallions
   葱烧豆腐
   Silky tofu braised in a savory sauce infused with the aroma of fried scallions.

8. Home-style Braised Tofu Puffs
   家常油豆腐
   Spongy tofu puffs that absorb all the delicious sauce of the dish.

---

Staples (主食)

9. Handmade Dumplings
   饺子
   The ultimate Chinese comfort food. Hand-wrapped and boiled to perfection.
